'''Nakk Kech''' was the [[Commander/Legends|commander]] of the [[Khuiumin Survivors]]' [[Rock Squadron]]. He had thinning gray and brown hair and his cheeks were covered in stubble.

When [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] (going by the alias [[Jenos Idanian]]) infiltrated the Survivors while searching for his wife [[Mirax Terrik Horn|Mirax]], he was placed in Rock Squadron under Kech's command. Kech personally trained Horn in the usage of the [[Clutch (fighter)|Clutch starfighter]].

Kech was killed in a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] engagement against [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] and [[Ugly/Legends|Uglies]] when the ''[[Invidious]]'' failed to appear on schedule. Afterwards, "Idanian" was selected to replace him as Rock Lead.

==Appearances==
*''[[I, Jedi]]'' {{Ab|I, Jedi (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
